actions.name: Damp
actions.description: Effect: @Trait[explode] and @Trait[firearm] Attacks and Abilities fail when they are declared in range, consuming their costs as normal. These declared Attacks gain @Affliction[disabled 2] (if the Attack originated from a Weapon, all of that weapon’s @Trait[explode] and @Trait[firearm] Attacks are @Affliction[disabled 2]), and these declared Abilities gain @Affliction[nullified 2].
